<?php declare(strict_types=1); namespace League\Flysystem; use RuntimeException; class PathTraversalDetected extends RuntimeException implements FilesystemException { private string $path; public function path(): string { return $this->path; } public static function forPath(string $path): PathTraversalDetected { $e = new PathTraversalDetected("Path traversal detected: {$path}"); $e->path = $path; return $e; } }
